title: Stable tag and version consistency
summary: The plugin version and readme stable tag should stay aligned, and the stable tag should not be trunk.

detection.notes: The current shell script does a basic text comparison. The core engine should parse headers more reliably.

guidance.why_it_matters: Version mismatches and trunk stable tags are common repository blockers and can confuse update behavior.
guidance.fix: Set Stable tag in readme.txt to the released version number and keep it aligned with the main plugin header version.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Low to medium. Detection quality depends on correctly identifying the main plugin file.
